channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tropical Storm Arthur weakens but still poses flash flooding threat
item.description: Tropical Storm Arthur, the first named storm of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season, weakened to a post-tropical cyclone after landfall.

item.title: Chicago man faces arson, hate crime charges after cross burning in Grant Park
item.description: Flames from the cross burning in Grant Park were visible to anyone driving or walking down Columbus Drive.

item.title: Inside an Irish town raising kids without smartphones
item.description: When parents and educators in Greystones, Ireland saw children dealing with increasing anxiety, they acted and removed phones from the equation.

item.title: WATCH: How a sports team winning is good for fans' brains
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to a neurologist about the real benefit of watching sports.
